title: Versona session manifest
description: Machine-readable session metadata; extends VERSONA-FRAMEWORK §7.4. Mirrors SESSION.md frontmatter when both exist.

session_id.description: Same as folder name or stable UUID; unique within the repo convention.

versona_kind.description: discipline | routing | family_aggregator | meta | workflow (per VERSONA-FRAMEWORK §2).

discipline.description: Display name when versona_kind is discipline.

parent_session.description: Relative path to parent session folder for chains.

ember_log_ref.description: Path to ember-logs/YYYY-MM-DD.md and optional anchor.

versona_session_schema_version.description: Integer or semver for manifest shape versioning.

actor.description: Opaque actor label (folder under versona/); optional duplicate of path convention.

request_ledger_ids.description: ledger_entry_id values linking this session to intake rows.

routing_decision_path.description: Repo-relative path to outputs/routing-decision.json when persisted.
